description: Access to the Vault of memories and Admin profile (Identity and History).

commands.read_history: Extract the last N saved messages from the database history.
commands.remember_info: Save important information about the user in the biographical profile.
commands.reset_memory: Execute the Tabula Rasa protocol: clear the entire episodic chat history.
commands.who_am_i: Ask Zentra to retrieve identity data for the Admin and the AI (context profile).

function.name: MEMORY__read_history
function.description: Extract the last N saved messages from the database history.

n.description: The number of previous messages to extract (e.g. '10').

function.name: MEMORY__remember_info
function.description: Save important information about the user in the biographical profile.

text.description: The detailed information to remember (e.g. 'The user likes coffee').

function.name: MEMORY__reset_memory
function.description: Execute the Tabula Rasa protocol: clear the entire episodic chat history.

function.name: MEMORY__who_am_i
function.description: Ask Zentra to retrieve identity data for the Admin and the AI (context profile).
